<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk003.pdf#page=5 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p108 -->

I ANDKREIS TRAUNSTEIN - MOGLING

<!-- header: LANDKREIS TRAUNSTEIN · MOGLING -->


[[File:Band11_chunk003_p005_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk003_p005_img002.jpg|thumb|Geburt Mariens (Joseph Moy 1758)]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p109 -->
